modules.title: Module 1: OOP Basics
examFocus: OOP pillars: Encapsulation, Abstraction, Inheritance, Polymorphism
Structured vs OOP differences (very common theory question)

topics.title: OOP Paradigm + Structured vs OOP
topics.summary: What OOP is, and how it differs from procedural/structured programming.

topics.title: Object vs Class + Object Class Methods
topics.summary: A class is the blueprint; an object is its real instance. Plus the key Object class methods: toString(), equals(), hashCode().

topics.title: Encapsulation & Abstraction
topics.summary: Encapsulation = data + methods together; Abstraction = expose necessary parts, hide implementation details.

topics.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
topics.summary: Inheritance = reuse; Polymorphism = same name, different behavior (compile-time/run-time).

topics.title: Java Evolution, Bytecode & JVM Architecture
topics.summary: Java flow: .java → compiler → .class (bytecode) → JVM executes (platform independent).

topics.title: Structure of a Java Program
topics.summary: Class, main method, statements, compilation and execution steps.

topics.title: Data Types, Type Casting & Arrays
topics.summary: Primitive/reference types, implicit/explicit casting, arrays basics.

topics.title: Classes, Objects, Constructors, this, Garbage Collection
topics.summary: Object creation, constructor types, `this` usage, GC basic idea.

topics.title: Methods: Overloading, Passing Objects, Access Control, static/final, CLI Args
topics.summary: Overloading vs overriding, object as param, return object, access modifiers, static/final, args[].

topics.title: Inheritance: super, constructors, overriding, dynamic dispatch
topics.summary: Superclass-subclass relation, super keyword, overriding and runtime binding.

topics.title: Abstract Classes + final with Inheritance
topics.summary: The role of abstract classes + the effect of final on classes, methods, and variables.

topics.title: Packages, import, and member access
topics.summary: Package purpose, creation, importing, access control with packages.

topics.title: Interfaces (default/static/private methods)
topics.summary: Interface basics, Java 8 default/static methods, and Java 9 private interface methods (with example).

topics.title: Exception Handling (core + user-defined)
topics.summary: Exception flow + built-in vs custom; throw vs throws; finally usage.

topics.title: String Handling: String operations + StringBuffer
topics.summary: String is immutable; StringBuffer is mutable, useful for frequent modifications.

topics.title: Generics (Generic Class, Two Type Params)
topics.summary: Generics provide type safety and improve code reuse.

topics.title: Multithreading: model, creation, join/isAlive, priorities, synchronization
topics.summary: Threads basics: create/run, join/isAlive, and synchronization concept (race condition).

topics.title: I/O: Console + Files + PrintWriter
topics.summary: Console input/output and file reading/writing (basic flow).
